items.title: ADS & Python Tools, (Sat, Jun 21st)
items.content: <article>Ehsaan Mavani talks about Alternate Data Streams (ADS) in diary entry "Alternate Data Streams ? Adversary Defense Evasion and Detection [Guest Diary]".</article>

items.title: Resurgence of the Prometei Botnet
items.author: Lee Wei Yeong and Pranay Kumar Chhaparwal
items.content: We identified a resurgence of the Prometei botnet's Linux variant. Our analysis tracks the activity of this cryptominer and its new features.
